Create PTM Peptide Names

Source: R/RawDataProcessing.R
name.peptide.Rd

Builds standardized PTM peptide names from gene symbols, modification type, amino acid, and site information. Supports ambiguous entries separated by a delimiter.

Usage

name.peptide(genes, modification = "p", sites, aa, pepsep = ";")

Arguments

genes

A character string of one or more gene symbols.

modification

A character string indicating modification shorthand. Defaults to "p".

sites

A character string of one or more site positions.

aa

A character string containing the amino acid code.

pepsep

A separator used in genes and sites for ambiguous entries. Defaults to ";".

Value

A character string containing unique peptide names.

Examples

name.peptide("MAPK1; MAPK3", sites = "185; 204", aa = "T")
#> [1] "MAPK1 p T185;  MAPK3 p T 204"

On this page
